creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144351
SAGA GIS 2.1.2, corrected for disabled options

It seems, Haru PDF can not disabled completely any more. Because of this I removed that as an option, so it is always enabled.

options for PostgreSQL and ViGRa should be ok now, the doubled gui.desktop file will be installed via desktop entries.

Hope, all is ok now. Thanks for your work.
